body_txt: A character who has survived a hanging . They will frequently sport a scarred or deformed neck as a result. This may just indicate that he is a real hard case and too tough to kill easily , or it may be used to show what a bad life he has led and to explain his hatred of the world. A Bungled Suicide may also be involved. If he survived three attempts , a sporting (or superstitious) executioner may have let him go . Probably because it's best to keep on the good side of a badass like that. Shoot the Rope may be used to explain their survival.
